_comment: generate_chance: float 0.0–1.0. Per-chunk probability gate. 0.0 = never, 0.5 = 50% of candidate chunks (default), 1.0 = every candidate chunk.

y_base: int. Minimum absolute Y coordinate at which the cave centre is placed (default: -24). Increase for shallower caves, decrease for deeper ones. Works correctly in any world height (vanilla, BigGlobe, etc.).
y_range: int. Random Y offset added on top of y_base, in blocks (default: 30). Actual Y = y_base + random(0, y_range-1). Defaults replicate vanilla behaviour: Y -24 to +5.
entity_type: The dragon spawned inside the cave.
stalactite_block: Block used to build ceiling stalactites.
treasure_pile_block: Block scattered as treasure on the cave floor.
palette: [primary_wall_block, secondary_wall_block] used to build the cave shell.
ore_tag: Block tag for ore veins that can appear in the cave walls.
loot_table_male / loot_table_female: Chest loot depending on the resident dragon's sex.
biomes: Biome tag controlling eligible spawn biomes. Override separately with a datapack tag file.
